note: One group per must-catch gold negative (group id = bundle id). The verdict's findings (class + locus text) must name the owning in-bundle signal — a blanket 'reject, unsafe' earns nothing. Matched case-insensitively over NFKC+casefold-normalized locus text, compiled by the frozen idea_gates instrument.
